zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Arundel於1407年出生在英國英格蘭素可帕哈姆時，她的父親Sir Richard Arundel41歲，母親Alice Burley38歲。她於1426年與Sir Thomas Willoughby在英國素可帕哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1439年7月1日之前在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Arundel于1407年出生在英国英格兰素可帕哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Richard Arundel41岁，母亲Alice Burley38岁。她于1426年与Sir Thomas Willoughby在英国素可帕哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1439年7月1日之前在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Arundel was born in 1407, in Parham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Arundel, was 41 and her mother, Alice Burley, was 38. She married Sir Thomas Willoughby in 1426, in Parham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died before 1 July 1439, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Arundel est née en 1407, à Parham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Arundel, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Burley, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Willoughby en 1426, à Parham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1 juillet 1439, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Arundel 1407 in Parham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Arundel 41 und ihre Mutter Alice Burley 38. Sie hat 1426 in Parham, Sussex, England Sir Thomas Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb vor 1. Juli 1439 in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Arundel è nata il nel 1407 nel Parham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Arundel, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice Burley, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Willoughby nel 1426, nel Parham, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 1 luglio 1439, nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Arundelが1407年にイギリスイギリススセックスパーハムで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Arundelは41歳，母Alice Burleyは38歳であった。1426年にイギリススセックスパーハムでSir Thomas Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1439年7月1日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Arundel(이)가 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 파람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Arundel(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Burley(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1426년 영국 수세스 파람에서 Sir Thomas Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 7월 1일 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Arundel nasceu em 1407, em Parham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Arundel, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Burley, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Willoughby em 1426, em Parham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu antes 1 de julho de 1439, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Arundel родилась в 1407 г. в местности парам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Arundel было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Burley, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Willoughby в 1426 г. в местности парам, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла перед 1 июля 1439 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Arundel nació en 1407, en Parham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Arundel, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Burley, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Willoughby en 1426, en Parham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 1 de julio de 1439, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
